prompt:
A sponge filter core being maintained: the foam sponge sits in a shallow bowl of dechlorinated aquarium water, visibly wet and freshly squeezed clean. A small bucket and a pair of nitrile gloves are nearby, indicating careful handling to preserve beneficial bacteria.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a grounded near-future aquaria maintenance aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean surfaces, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the wet foam texture and “rinsed in tank water” context obvious at icon scale.
